title: allium lenkoranicum
intro: Allium lenkoranicum, also known as Azerbaijani onion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Allium genus, which includes various types of onions and garlic. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allium lenkoranicum include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Allium lenkoranicum can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to support respiratory health and immune function.
